texto: We live in an era where the best way to make a dent on the world may no longer be to write a letter to the editor or publish a book. It may be simply to stand up and say something . . . because both the words and the passion with which they are delivered can now spread across the world at warp speed.
explicacao: Citação de Chris J. Anderson sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “We live in an era where the best way to make a dent on the world may no longer be to write a lett…” articula vida, passion, power em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como power e public-speaking.
